extension.summary: Fetch TV show metadata from themoviedb.org
extension.description: TMDB TV show scraper with improved artwork handling.
extension.news: v1.0.3 - Punctuation agnostic title matching, year filter fallback, tweaks to external ID search, fix Fanart.tv cache growth v1.0.2 - Fix search result ordering and broken folder name parsing v1.0.1 - Add more details to manual scrape selection v1.0.0 - Initial release
